title: Gujarat Accelerates AI Push With Plan To Provide Over 100 Gpus To Startups, Institutions
description: (MENAFN - IANS) Gandhinagar, March 29 (IANS) Gujarat has moved to expand access to advanced computing infrastructure for artificial intelligence, announcing plans to deploy more than 100 ...

title: 96% of codebases rely on open source, and AI slop is putting them at risk
description: Verbose changes. Nonsensical descriptions. Pull requests contributors can’t explain. AI is DDoS-ing open source software (OSS) with slop, and some maintainers are calling it quits. As Steve Croce, field CTO at Anaconda, a Python data science platform, tells The New Stack, “It’s having a profound effect on maintainer workload.” In response, maintainers are canceling bug [...]

title: AI expert drops brutal truth about kids' future: 'Save money for them'
description: A tech professional's candid admission about AI's unpredictable future for her children has sparked widespread discussion. She emphasizes financial security, fostering creativity and imagination, building resilience for career shifts, and nurturing genuine human connection as crucial preparations. Online reactions echo these sentiments, highlighting the importance of adaptability and human skills in an AI-driven world.

title: AI reading tools show promise for schools but experts warn against over-reliance
description: AI reading tools may soon be standard in schools, but experts warn over-reliance risks harming student progress. Teachers' judgment, motivation, and modeling remain essential to what algorithms can't replace.

title: Scaling Autonomous AI in Healthcare Without Compromising Clinical Trust
description: AI in healthcare will not fail because the models are weak. It will stall when leaders hesitate to redesign how decisions are made, measured and governed. The post Scaling Autonomous AI in Healthcare Without Compromising Clinical Trust appeared first on MedCity News .
